morePage.subtitle: Secondary trip tools, preferences, and support.

errors.dataDescription: Something went wrong while loading trip data. Check your connection and try again.

sync.unavailable: Cloud Sync unavailable. Using offline data.
sync.loadFailed: Cloud sync failed. Your saved local data is still available.
sync.notConfigured: Cloud sync is unavailable because Firebase is not configured.
sync.offlineHint: Changes are saved on this device and will sync when you're back online.

favorites.title: No favorites yet
favorites.description: Tap Favorite on Places or Food pages to save spots for quick access here.

search.title: Search your trip
search.description: Find itinerary activities, places, restaurants, hotel, flights, and transport.

searchNoResults.title: No results found
searchNoResults.description: Try another keyword or switch the category filter.

memories.title: No memories yet
memories.description: Tap + to add your first trip memory with notes, tags, and photo placeholders.

memoriesPhotos.title: No uploaded photos yet
memoriesPhotos.description: Add photos to a journal entry and they will appear here.

budget.title: No expenses yet
budget.description: Tap + to add your first expense and track trip spending.

budgetNoResults.title: No matching expenses
budgetNoResults.description: Try a different search term or clear your filters.

checklist.description: Add packing and pre-trip tasks to stay organized before you go.

food.description: Try a different category to see more restaurants and cafes.

itinerary.description: No itinerary days were found. Please verify your local itinerary data.

weatherAlerts.high: High rain chance. Keep an umbrella or light rain jacket close.
weatherAlerts.medium: Possible showers. Pack a compact umbrella just in case.
weatherAlerts.low: Low rain chance. No rain gear needed for most of the day.

weatherOutfits.hot: Light breathable clothes, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, and a small towel.
weatherOutfits.rainy: Quick-dry layers, waterproof shoes if possible, and a compact umbrella.
weatherOutfits.cool: A light jacket or cardigan for morning and evening.
weatherOutfits.default: Comfortable layers and walking shoes for a full travel day.

auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in with Google to access your trip
auth.notConfigured: Firebase is not configured. Add VITE_FIREBASE_* keys to your environment.
auth.notAllowed: This account is not allowed to access this trip.

translator.title: AI Translator
translator.subtitle: Translate phrases on the go
translator.mockHint: Offline mock translation — try “hello” or “thank you”.
translator.emptyDescription: Pick languages, type a phrase, and tap Translate. Saved phrases sync across devices.
translator.phrasebookEmptyDescription: Save translations you want to reuse during your trip.
translator.historyEmptyDescription: Recent translations will show up here automatically.
translator.usingMock: Offline translation used — results may be limited.
